business.name: WTC Heating & Plumbing Ltd
business.tagline: Reliable Heating Solutions For Every Home

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Excellent service from WTC — sourced a hard-to-find boiler part quickly and the team were really helpful throughout. Would definitely recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Priya M
sample_reviews.text: Friendly and knowledgeable staff. Got great advice on upgrading our central heating system and the pricing was very competitive.

sample_reviews.author: David K
sample_reviews.text: Good range of heating equipment in stock and quick turnaround on our order. Will be using WTC again for our next project.

brand.usp: WTC Heating & Plumbing Ltd offers expert heating equipment supply and professional installation services across Birmingham, combining quality products with reliable, knowledgeable support for homeowners and trade professionals alike.
brand.about_paragraph: At WTC Heating & Plumbing Ltd, we're passionate about keeping Birmingham homes warm and comfortable all year round. Based in the heart of Edgbaston, we supply and install a wide range of heating equipment, from boilers and radiators to full central heating systems. Whether you're a homeowner or a fellow trade professional, we're here to provide honest advice, quality products, and dependable service you can count on.
